Field.name: breakpoint_1_damage_mult
Field.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the first breakpoint.

Field.name: breakpoint_2_damage_mult
Field.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the second breakpoint.

Field.name: breakpoint_3_damage_mult
Field.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the third breakpoint.

Field.name: breakpoint_4_damage_mult
Field.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the fourth breakpoint.
